About Dataset¶

The Bangalore EEG Epilepsy Dataset (BEED) is a comprehensive EEG collection for epileptic seizure detection and classification. Recorded at a neurological research centre in Bangalore, India, it features high-fidelity EEG signals captured using the standard 10-20 electrode system at a 256 Hz sampling rate. BEED contains 16,000 segments of 20-second EEG recordings evenly distributed across four categories: Healthy Subjects (0), Generalized Seizures (1), Focal Seizures (2), and Seizure Events (3), where seizure activity occurs with events like eye blinking, nail biting, or staring. The dataset comprises 16 EEG channels (X1-X16) corresponding to different brain regions, with a binary label (y) indicating:

  • Healthy Subjects (0)

  • Generalized Seizures (1)

  • Focal Seizures (2)

  • Seizure Events (3)

The machine learning and hybrid models were applied for classification. Performance was evaluated using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score, and Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) and, The Extra Trees + PSO (Particle Swarm Optimization) hybrid model achieved the best performance across all metrics, with 98.31% accuracy and 97.75% MCC, outperforming standalone ML models as this table.

In [1]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, cross_val_score
from sklearn.neural_network import MLPClassifier
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier
from sklearn.metrics import (
    accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score,
    matthews_corrcoef, classification_report, confusion_matrix
)
from sklearn.preprocessing import label_binarize
from sklearn.ensemble import (
    ExtraTreesClassifier,
    RandomForestClassifier,
    AdaBoostClassifier
)
from sklearn.linear_model import (
    LogisticRegression,
    SGDClassifier
)
from sklearn.svm import SVC
from pyswarms.single.global_best import GlobalBestPSO

import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

In [9]:
X = df.drop('y', axis=1)  # Features (X1-X16)
Y = df['y']                # Target
In [35]:
# ----------------- Train-Test Split -----------------
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, Y,test_size=.20,random_state=42, shuffle=True)
X_train.shape, y_train.shape, X_test.shape, y_test.shape
Out[35]:
((6400, 16), (6400,), (1600, 16), (1600,))
In [36]:
# Logistic Regression
model1 = LogisticRegression(penalty='l2',C=1.0, max_iter=1000)
model1.fit(X_train, y_train)
predictions1 = model1.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model1.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions1)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions1))

# Evaluation metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions1)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions1)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions1)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: Logistic Regression')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# Train AdaBoost
model3 = AdaBoostClassifier(n_estimators=20, learning_rate=1.0,random_state=42)
model3.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predictions
predictions3 = model3.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model3.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions3)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions3))

# Evaluation metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions3)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions3)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions3)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: AdaBoost')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [38]:
# MLP model
model_mlp = MLPClassifier(hidden_layer_sizes=(100,), activation='relu',solver='adam',random_state=44)
model_mlp.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predictions
predictions_mlp = model_mlp.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_mlp.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_mlp)

print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_mlp))

# Evaluation metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_mlp)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_mlp)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_mlp)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot confusion matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: MLPClassifier')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [39]:
# Train Decision Tree Classifier
model_dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(criterion='gini', splitter='best', max_depth=5,random_state=42)
model_dt.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predictions
predictions_dt = model_dt.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy scores
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_dt.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_dt)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
report = classification_report(y_test, predictions_dt)
print("Classification Report:\n", report)

# Evaluation metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_dt)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_dt)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_dt)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", cm)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: Decision Tree')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [40]:
# Random Forest
model_rf = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=20,criterion='gini', max_depth=None,random_state=42)
model_rf.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predictions
predictions_rf = model_rf.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy scores
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_rf.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_rf)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_rf))

# Evaluation metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_rf)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_rf)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_rf)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: Random Forest')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# Train SVM
model_svm = SVC(kernel='rbf', probability=True, random_state=42)
model_svm.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predict
predictions_svm = model_svm.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_svm.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_svm)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_svm))

# Metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_svm)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_svm, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_svm, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_svm, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_svm)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_svm)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: SVM')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [42]:
# Train SGDClassifier
model_sgd = SGDClassifier(loss='log_loss', max_iter=1000, tol=1e-3, random_state=42)
model_sgd.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predict
predictions_sgd = model_sgd.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_sgd.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_sgd)

print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_sgd))

# Evaluation Metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_sgd)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_sgd)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_sgd)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: SGDClassifier')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [43]:
# Train ExtraTreesClassifier
model_et = ExtraTreesClassifier(n_estimators=50, 
                               random_state=42, 
                               criterion='gini',
                               max_features='sqrt',
                               bootstrap=True)
model_et.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Predict
predictions_et = model_et.predict(X_test)

# Accuracy
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_et.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_et)

print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

# Classification Report
print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_et))

# Evaluation Metrics
accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_et)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_et)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# Confusion Matrix
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_et)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

# Plot Confusion Matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: ExtraTreesClassifier')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [21]:
# ------------------ PSO Objective Function ------------------ #
def et_pso_objective(params):
    n_particles = params.shape[0]
    scores = []

    for i in range(n_particles):
        n_estimators = int(params[i][0])
        max_depth = int(params[i][1])

        if n_estimators < 10 or max_depth < 1:
            scores.append(1.0)
            continue

        clf = ExtraTreesClassifier(
            n_estimators=n_estimators,
            max_depth=max_depth,
            random_state=42,
            n_jobs=-1
        )

        score = cross_val_score(clf, X_train, y_train, cv=10, scoring='accuracy').mean()
        scores.append(1 - score)

    return np.array(scores)

# ------------------ PSO Optimization ------------------ #
bounds = (np.array([10, 2]), np.array([200, 50]))

optimizer = GlobalBestPSO(
    n_particles=10,
    dimensions=2,
    options={'c1': 0.5, 'c2': 0.3, 'w': 0.9},
    bounds=bounds
)

best_cost, best_pos = optimizer.optimize(et_pso_objective, iters=20)

best_n_estimators = int(best_pos[0])
best_max_depth = int(best_pos[1])
print(f"Best Parameters from PSO: n_estimators={best_n_estimators}, max_depth={best_max_depth}")

# ------------------ Train Optimized Extra Trees ------------------ #
model_etpso = ExtraTreesClassifier(
    n_estimators=best_n_estimators,
    max_depth=best_max_depth,
    random_state=42,
    n_jobs=-1
)
model_etpso.fit(X_train, y_train)
predictions_etpso = model_etpso.predict(X_test)

# ------------------ Evaluation ------------------ #
train_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_train, model_etpso.predict(X_train))
test_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_etpso)
print("Training Accuracy:", train_accuracy)
print("Testing Accuracy:", test_accuracy)

print("Classification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_test, predictions_etpso))

accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_etpso)
precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro')
recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro')
f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_etpso)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print('*******************************************')

# ------------------ Confusion Matrix ------------------ #
conf_matrix = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions_etpso)
print("Confusion Matrix:\n", conf_matrix)

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.set(font_scale=1.5)
sns.heatmap(conf_matrix, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.ylabel('Actual')
plt.xlabel('Predicted')
plt.title('Confusion Matrix: Optimized Extra Trees (PSO)')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# Create list of model results
results = [
    {'Model': 'Logistic Regression', 'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions1), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions1, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions1)},
    {'Model': ' Adaptive Boosting',           'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions3), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions3, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions3)},
    {'Model': 'Multilayer Perceptron',      'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_mlp), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_mlp, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_mlp)},
    {'Model': 'Decision Tree',       'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_dt), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_dt, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_dt)},
    {'Model': 'Random Forest',       'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_rf), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_rf, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_rf)},
    {'Model': 'Support Vector Classification',                'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_sgd), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_sgd)},
    {'Model': 'Stochastic Gradient Descent ',      'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_sgd), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_sgd, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_sgd)},
     {'Model': 'Extra Trees',         'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_et), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_et, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_et)},
    {'Model': 'ExtraTrees + PSO',           'Accuracy': accuracy_score(y_test, predictions_etpso), 'Precision': precision_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro'), 'Recall': recall_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro'), 'F1 Score': f1_score(y_test, predictions_etpso, average='macro'), 'MCC': matthews_corrcoef(y_test, predictions_etpso)},
]

# Convert to DataFrame
results_df = pd.DataFrame(results)

#Results table
results_df
